sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n63007" key="lhyoligo/misqos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ληψ-ολῐγό-μισθος</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τέχνη</foreign>, the art of <sense id="n63007.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">taking low pay</tr_>, cj. Hemsterh. in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0450.tlg001:14:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ephipp.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">14.4</biblScope> </bibl> (<itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ληψιγομ</itype>- codd.): Meineke <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ληψι-λογό-μισθος</orth> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">receiving pay for words.</tr_> </sense> </entryFree>
